snippet.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit вАФ stripped-down sets, an intimate setting вАФ just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts вАФ which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago вАФ you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday вАФ the track will feature guest vocals from GIVE≈МN and Daniel Caesar вАФ just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

#justinbieber #tinydesk #nprmusic #pop #rnb

snippet.title: Mira Esto Antes De Que Se Estrene Liga De La Justicia De Zack Snyder
snippet.description:
HBO Max estrenar√° la versi√≥n de Snyder de Liga De La Justicia, de cuatro horas de duraci√≥n. Cuando filmaba Liga De La Justicia, Snyder sufri√≥ una p√©rdida familiar muy grande, y se alej√≥ antes de poder terminarla. Warner Bros. contrat√≥ a Joss Whedon, que ya hab√≠a demostrado su capacidad para crear equipos de superh√©roes con The Avengers en el Universo Cinematogr√°fico de Marvel, para que terminara la pel√≠cula. Whedon no se limit√≥ a terminar lo que Snyder empez√≥: sino que reescribi√≥ y volvi√≥ a rodar la mayor parte de la pel√≠cula, seg√Їn The Boys, Warner Bros. decidi√≥ que "la reescritura de Joss era realmente buena."

Pero Liga De La Justicia se estren√≥ en noviembre del 2017, y fue declarada una decepci√≥n. Mezclaba torpemente los di√°logos √°giles de Whedon con el ambiente austero de Snyder, adem√°s de tener dificultades para presentar a los nuevos miembros del equipo. Poco tiempo despu√©s, los fans y estrellas como Gal Gadot y Ben Affleck exigieron en Twitter que Warner liberara la versi√≥n de Snyder con el hashtag #ReleaseTheSnyderCut.

Ahora, por fin lleg√≥ el momento. La version de Zack Snyder de Liga De La Justicia llega el 18 de marzo a HBO Max. Aqu√≠ va todo lo que necesitas saber.

La mayor parte de la versi√≥n de Snyder es del material original | 0:00
El Cyborg de Ray Fisher tendr√° un papel m√°s importante | 2:50
El Snyder Cut contar√° con varios personajes nuevos | 4:11
El Joker de Jared Leto har√° su aparici√≥n | 5:35
La Liga de la Justicia de Zack Snyder no es canon del UEDC | 6:50

Lee El Art√≠culo Completo (en √Нngles): https://www.looper.com/354976/what-to-know-about-the-justice-league-snyder-cut-before-it-comes-out/

snippet.description:

вАЬTo Begin AgainвАЭ Ingrid Michaelson x ZAYN
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and ZAYN
Produced by Sam de Jong
Mixed by Rob Kinelski
Mastered by Emily Lazar

Lyrics:
When the world was ending
IвАЩd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places weвАЩd never been
When the world was ending
WeвАЩd hold on to the past
Because itвАЩs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened

And, itвАЩs alright
ItвАЩs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I donвАЩt know how
I donвАЩt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that weвАЩd play
So far from comprehending
TheyвАЩd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away
But then the sun came right back
And the kids played as if nothing had happened

And, itвАЩs alright
ItвАЩs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I donвАЩt know how
I donвАЩt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again

And cry because IвАЩm happy
And hold my friends like long lost lovers
Be kind to me and love each other
The world keeps spinning on

ItвАЩs alright
ItвАЩs ok
We will get another day
 
I donвАЩt know how
I donвАЩt know when
But I do know that we can
Try to begin again, to begin again
To begin to live and love and breathe again

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

snippet.title: ¬°LAS HORMIGAS PINTARON A UNA LARVA! Primer logro de mis HORMIGAS de JARDIN
snippet.description:
¬°Hoy continuamos los experimentos con hormigas! Vamos a alimentar a mis hormigas con larvas y capullos, por supuesto utilizando el mismo sirop de colores y de azucar que utilizamos en el video pasado. Si nunca habias visto hormigas que cambian de color, pues estas a punto de ver algo increible. Vamos a ver un poco como viven las hormigas y su reaccion a este sirop de colores y a las larvas. Veremos como se alimentan las hormigas y les mostraremos los resultados inesperados en camara lenta. Ya no hay mas nada que contarles, solo vamos a comenzar de una vez con los experimentos divertidos y a ver a nuestras hormigas que cambian de color y ver que ocurre con las larvas. No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

¬°Suscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

вЦЇ Para propuestas comerciales: timon@mediacube.in 

Este canal es la VERSI√УN OFICIAL del canal TimOn ChaveS para la audiencia hispanohablante.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Recap
snippet.description:
On March 3, Starship serial number 10 (SN10) completed SpaceXвАЩs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype as it successfully ascended, transitioned propellant, and reoriented itself for reentry and an active aerodynamic controlled descent. SN10вАЩs Raptor engines reignited to perform the vehicleвАЩs landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad.

Test flights such as SN10вАЩs are about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

en.title: Degree Confluence Project, the most incredible collective plan
en.description:
Parallels and meridians are imaginary lines with which the entire surface of the Earth can be divided. Have you ever wondered what is at the points where they intersect between the two?

A group of people did, and the Degree Confluence Project was born. It is a collective project that set out to visit the confluences that exist on the planet. Would you like to know any? The good news is that you are likely to be relatively close to one, since it is not possible to be more than 79 kilometers from a confluence.

So far 40% of the goal has been reached, so there are still many to visit and register.

For those who want to know more about the project: confluence.org

Thanks to Fronteras Blog, where we learned about this story: bordersblog.com

рЯМО Un Mundo Inmenso

snippet.title: Zack SnyderвАЩs Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвАЩs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
snippet.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

snippet.title: ¬°PINTE A MIS HORMIGAS DE VARIOS COLORES!
snippet.description:
¬°Chicos hice un experimento con hormigas y a que no adivinan...tengo hormigas que cambian de color! Se trata de las hormigas fellah o camponotus fellah...he preparado sirop de colores: rosado y azul. Los coloqu√© en un vidrio y espera a que las hormigas fellah llegaran y bebieran el sirop de colores. Resultados inesperados completamente: las hormigas cambian de color! Al beber el sirop de colores sus barrigas cambian de color, es una de las reacciones quimicas mas interesantes que he visto en mi vida, y por su puesto se los mostrar√© en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limite. Adoro los experimentos caseros como este llenos de curiosidades, para mas videos divertidos y experimentos divertidos...date un paseo por mi canal! No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

¬°Suscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

вЦЇ Para propuestas comerciales: timon@mediacube.in 

Este canal es la VERSI√УN OFICIAL del canal TimOn ChaveS para la audiencia hispanohablante.

snippet.title: [MV] Mew Suppasit - THANOS
snippet.description:
Song: THANOS (аЄШаЄ≤аЄЩаЄ≠аЄ™) 
Artist: Mew Suppasit Jongcheveevat
аЄ®аЄіаЄ•аЄЫаЄіаЄЩ: аЄ°аЄіаЄІ аЄ®аЄЄаЄ†аЄ®аЄіаЄ©аЄПаєМ аЄИаЄЗаЄКаЄµаЄІаЄµаЄІаЄ±аЄТаЄЩаєМ 

аєАаЄЩаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄ£аєЙаЄ≠аЄЗ : аЄШаЄЩаЄБаЄ§аЄХ аЄЮаЄ≤аЄЩаЄіаЄКаЄІаЄіаЄЧаЄҐаєМ
Lyric: Wan Soloist 

Music: Wan Soloist
аЄЧаЄ≥аЄЩаЄ≠аЄЗ: аЄШаЄЩаЄБаЄ§аЄХ аЄЮаЄ≤аЄЩаЄіаЄКаЄІаЄіаЄЧаЄҐаєМ 

Arrangement: 
аєАаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄЪаєАаЄ£аЄµаЄҐаЄЗ: аЄ≠аЄ±аЄДаЄ£аЄКаЄЩаЄКаєМ аЄ£аЄ≤аЄКаЄЫаЄ±аЄЩаЄФаЄі 

CHORUS: аЄЫаЄ£аЄ≤аєВаЄ°аЄЧаЄҐаєМ аЄЫаЄ≤аЄЧаЄ≤аЄЩ
Vocal Director : аЄЫаЄ£аЄ≤аєВаЄ°аЄЧаЄҐаєМ аЄЫаЄ≤аЄЧаЄ≤аЄЩ
Engineer: аЄ≠аЄ±аЄДаЄ£аЄКаЄЩаЄКаєМ аЄ£аЄ≤аЄКаЄЫаЄ±аЄЩаЄФаЄі
Producer: Wan Soloist

Lyrics:
аєАаЄЩаЄЈаєЙаЄ≠аЄ£аєЙаЄ≠аЄЗ: 

A1 аЄЧаЄЄаЄБаЄ≠аЄҐаєИаЄ≤аЄЗаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄ°аЄµаЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаєГаЄЂаєЙаєАаЄШаЄ≠аєДаЄЫаЄЂаЄ°аЄФаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІ аЄДаЄІаЄ≤аЄ°аЄ£аЄ±аЄБаЄФаЄµ аєЖ аЄЧаЄµаєИаЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаєДаЄ°аєИаєАаЄДаЄҐаЄИаЄ∞аєГаЄЂаєЙаєГаЄДаЄ£
I've given all I had for you. A good love I do never give to no one's.

аЄ°аЄ≤аЄЪаЄ≠аЄБаЄІаєИаЄ≤аЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаЄ≠аЄҐаєИаЄ≤аєАаЄ™аЄµаЄҐаєАаЄІаЄ•аЄ≤аЄБаЄ±аЄЪаєАаЄШаЄ≠аЄИаЄ∞аєДаЄФаєЙаєДаЄЂаЄ° аЄІаЄ±аЄЩаЄЩаЄµаєЙаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ°аЄµаєБаЄ•аєЙаЄІаЄЂаЄ±аЄІаєГаЄИ аєДаЄ°аєИаєАаЄЂаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄЧаЄµаєИаЄХаЄ£аЄЗаєДаЄЂаЄЩаєГаЄЂаєЙаЄҐаЄЈаЄЩ 
Tell me don't just waste the time with you? Space of your heart for me to stand was done.

*аЄИаЄ≤аЄБаЄДаЄЩаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄ£аЄ±аЄБаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєАаЄЫаєЗаЄЩаЄДаЄЩаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ£аЄ±аЄБ аєБаЄДаєИаЄЩаЄ±аєЙаЄЩаєДаЄ°аєИаєАаЄЂаєЗаЄЩаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄ•аЄ≥аЄЪаЄ≤аЄБ аєДаЄ°аєИаЄИаЄ≥аєАаЄЫаєЗаЄЩаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄЧаЄ≥аєГаЄЂаєЙаєГаЄДаЄ£аєАаЄ™аЄµаЄҐаєГаЄИ
From the loved ones, becomes someone! Don't need to make big trouble, make it sorrow on me.

аєДаЄ°аєИаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаєГаЄИаЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄҐаЄЮаЄєаЄФаЄДаЄ≥аЄЧаЄµаєИаЄ°аЄ±аЄЩаЄБаЄ£аЄ∞аЄЧаЄЪаЄБаЄ£аЄ∞аєАаЄЧаЄЈаЄ≠аЄЩаєГаЄЂаєЙаЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄЩаЄЯаЄ±аЄЗаЄХаєИаЄ≠аєДаЄЫаєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄЂаЄІ..аєБаЄДаєИаєАаЄШаЄ≠аЄФаЄµаЄФаЄЩаЄіаєЙаЄІаЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаЄИаЄ∞аЄЂаЄ≤аЄҐаєДаЄЫ 
Need no such words made me injured, just snap your fingers I'll further gone.

A2 аЄЧаЄЄаЄБаЄ≠аЄҐаєИаЄ≤аЄЗаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄ°аЄµаЄЮаЄ±аЄЗаЄЧаЄ•аЄ≤аЄҐаЄ•аЄЗаЄХаЄ£аЄЗаЄЩаЄµаєЙ аЄИаЄ≤аЄБаЄІаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄФаЄµаЄИаЄЩаЄЦаЄґаЄЗаєАаЄІаЄ•аЄ≤аЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄЂаЄ≤аЄҐаєДаЄЫ
Things are all tumbling down, it's gone now with the time.

аЄДаЄ≥аЄІаєИаЄ≤аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ£аЄ±аЄБаєБаЄДаєИаЄЮаЄєаЄФаєАаЄЪаЄ≤ аєЖ аЄБаєЗаЄЯаЄ±аЄЗаєБаЄЧаЄЪаєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄЂаЄІ аЄИаЄ≤аЄБаЄЩаЄµаєЙаЄДаЄЗаєДаЄ°аєИаєАаЄЂаЄ•аЄЈаЄ≠аЄ≠аЄ∞аєДаЄ£ аєДаЄ°аєИаЄ£аЄєаєЙаЄІаєИаЄ≤аЄІаЄ±аЄЩаєДаЄЂаЄЩаЄИаЄ∞аЄ•аЄЈаЄ° 
You needn't say loud, that you love me no more. Nothing has left from now, and I don't know how I will fade it away.

**аЄИаЄ≤аЄБаЄДаЄЩаЄЧаЄµаєИаЄ£аЄ±аЄБаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄБаЄ≤аЄ£аєАаЄЫаєЗаЄЩаЄДаЄЩаєДаЄ°аєИаЄ£аЄ±аЄБ аєБаЄДаєИаЄЩаЄ±аєЙаЄЩаєДаЄ°аєИаєАаЄЂаєЗаЄЩаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄ•аЄ≥аЄЪаЄ≤аЄБ аєДаЄ°аєИаЄИаЄ≥аєАаЄЫаєЗаЄЩаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаЄЧаЄ≥аєГаЄЂаєЙаєГаЄДаЄ£аєАаЄ™аЄµаЄҐаєГаЄИ
From the loved ones, becomes someone! Don't need to make big trouble, make it sorrow on me.

аєДаЄ°аєИаЄХаєЙаЄ≠аЄЗаєГаЄИаЄ£аєЙаЄ≤аЄҐаЄЮаЄєаЄФаЄДаЄ≥аЄЧаЄµаєИаЄ°аЄ±аЄЩаЄБаЄ£аЄ∞аЄЧаЄЪаЄБаЄ£аЄ∞аєАаЄЧаЄЈаЄ≠аЄЩаєГаЄЂаєЙаЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаЄЧаЄЩаЄЯаЄ±аЄЗаЄХаєИаЄ≠аєДаЄЫаєДаЄ°аєИаєДаЄЂаЄІ.. аєДаЄ°аєИаЄЮаЄєаЄФаЄДаЄ≥аЄ•аЄ≤аЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаЄБаєЗаєАаЄВаєЙаЄ≤аєГаЄИ 
аЄ≠аЄҐаєИаЄ≤аєАаЄЂаєЗаЄЩаЄ°аЄ±аЄЩаєАаЄЫаєЗаЄЩаєАаЄ£аЄЈаєИаЄ≠аЄЗаЄҐаЄ≤аЄБаЄ≠аЄ∞аєДаЄ£..аєБаЄДаєИаєАаЄШаЄ≠аЄФаЄµаЄФаЄЩаЄіаєЙаЄІаЄЙаЄ±аЄЩаЄИаЄ∞аЄЂаЄ≤аЄҐаєДаЄЫ
Need no such words to make me cry, or say goodbye cause I feel it. Let do the thing that's easier! Just snap your fingers and I'll disappear.
вАГ
Lyrics:

A1 I've given all I had for you. A good love I do never give to no one's.
Tell me don't just waste the time with you? Space of your heart for me to stand was done.

*From the loved ones, becomes someone! Don't need to make big trouble, make it sorrow on me.
Need no such words made me injured, just snap your fingers I'll further gone.

A2 Things are all tumbling down, it's gone now with the time.
You needn't say loud, that you love me no more. Nothing has left from now, and I don't know how I will fade it away.

**From the loved ones, becomes someone! Don't need to make big trouble, make it sorrow on me.
Need no such words to make me cry, or say goodbye cause I feel it. Let do the thing that's easier! Just snap your fingers and I'll disappear.
